1886550.name: The Unexplained
1886550.description:
The Unexplained is a paranormal/psychological horror game where you and up to 6 people can go to various locations to discover and find the deep dark hidden secrets! But beware of the spirits left behind as we don't know if they are friendly. More details to come...

Features
  • Interactive Experience
  • Multiplayer
  • Proximity Voice Chat
  • Various Levels
  • Various Demons and Ghosts
  • Various Interactions and Events
  • Various Experiences Each Time
In The Unexplained we have created a system and will continue to improve the system to create a highly unique interactive experience with continuous improvements. Make your way through the level by yourself or with your friends until you release the spirit lurking behind the walls. Be careful of the various traps that could turn it into a rescue mission. Details will come out as the story develops...
1886550.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
